name: T8 ICT Neutral Human Head
modifications: Converted the neutral OBJ topology and expression meshes into one glTF 2.0 binary
Mapped ICT left/right expression names to the T8 ARKit-compatible 52-channel schema
Combined split browInnerUp and cheekPuff shapes into symmetric T8 channels
Added a conservative tongueOut deformation for the T8 channel missing from ICT Face Model Light
Recomputed smooth normals and assigned neutral clay studio materials
